violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was observed exceeding 400 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-300 ppm. Sanitizer was diluted to 300 ppm at the time of inspection. PIC will call for service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back of kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Per PIC, establishment will repair/extend door sweep. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine, 2 door stack shelves, and 2 door stack freezer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility/basement have an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings using appropriate means of sanitization. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by an abundance of small flying insects throughout establishment. The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by droppings throughout establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2024

The presence of cockroaches is not controlled as evidenced by dead roaches throughout establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC stated PCS comes weekly. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of: 1. Shelving (food residue / other debris) 2. Ice cream machine (food residue / other debris) 3. Coffee area (food residue / other debris) 4. Soda Machine (food residue / other debris) 5. Fryers (grease / food residue / other debris) 6. Fanta Machine (food residue / other debris) 7. Shelving (black residue) Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2024
At time of inspection, drain in basement was lacking a cover. PIC stated plumber has been contacted. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2024

The floor behind the ice machine has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The floors throughout the kitchen have a heavy accumulation of grease and soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. - Frappe machine - Ice cream machine - Cup holders - Under fountain drink shelving New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2024
The floors in the basement (boiler area) have an accumulation of droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the drive thru area does not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023
